headline: Big Bang Theory
description: The Big Bang theory (Georges Lemaître, 1927; term coined by Fred Hoyle, 1949) describes the universe's origin ~13.8 billion years ago from an infinitely hot, dense singularity. Evidence: cosmic microwave background radiation (CMB, discovered 1965), redshift of galaxies (Hubble, 1929), abundance of light elements (H, He).
